macros.label: Morning Brief
macros.prompt: Summarize current runtime health, subconscious pressure, open risks, and the single highest-value next action for the operator.

macros.label: Inspect Runtime
macros.prompt: Inspect the runtime and summarize guard/core/webui state, active failures, restart pressure, and anything needing operator attention.
macros.prompt_template: Inspect the runtime and summarize guard/core/webui state, active failures, restart pressure, and anything needing operator attention. Focus especially on {focus_area} and use a {detail_level} level of detail.

macros.label: Subconscious Review
macros.prompt: Review the latest subconscious run, explain the top training priorities, and recommend which generated regression sessions should run next.

macros.label: Patch Readiness
macros.prompt: Review patch readiness, preview eligibility, and validation posture. Summarize whether any preview is ready for safe apply and why.
macros.prompt_template: Review patch readiness, preview eligibility, and validation posture. Focus on {target_scope}. Summarize whether any preview is ready for safe apply and why.
